MessageContent: <StackPanel Name="panel" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:ui="http://schemas.lepo.co/wpfui/2022/xaml"><StackPanel Name="icon_content"><ui:SymbolIcon Symbol="MegaphoneLoud20" FontSize="100" /></StackPanel><TextBlock Text="Important Announcement!" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="17" TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Name="title" MaxWidth="450" Margin="0,20,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Visibility="Visible" /><TextBlock Text="MRA is being removed from Microsoft Store. You can read the full announcement from the link below." FontWeight="Normal" TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Name="message" MaxWidth="470" Margin="0,10,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Visibility="Visible" /></StackPanel>

<StackPanel Name="panel" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:ui="http://schemas.lepo.co/wpfui/2022/xaml"><ContentPresenter Name="ControlIcon" VerticalAlignment="Center" Focusable="False" Grid.Column="0"><ContentPresenter.Content><ui:SymbolIcon Symbol="Megaphone20" Filled="False" FontSize="80" Glyph="" /></ContentPresenter.Content></ContentPresenter><TextBlock Text="Action Required: Songlink API Shutting Down July 31st!" FontWeight="SemiBold" FontSize="17" TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Name="title" MaxWidth="450" Margin="0,20,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Visibility="Visible" /><TextBlock Text="The Songlink/Odesli public API is being discontinued on July 31, 2026. If you're on an older version of MRA, streaming links will stop working. Update to 0.2 Alpha to keep everything running." FontWeight="Normal" TextAlignment="Center" TextWrapping="WrapWithOverflow" Name="message" MaxWidth="470" Margin="0,10,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Visibility="Visible" /></StackPanel>
